all.en: Our school's volunteer club organized a charity bake sale to raise money for the local animal shelter.
all.zh: 我們學校的志工社舉辦了一場慈善烘焙義賣，為當地動物收容所募款。

all.en: I volunteered to bake one hundred chocolate chip cookies, which seemed easy at first.
all.zh: 我自願烤一百片巧克力豆餅乾，一開始看起來很簡單。

all.en: On Saturday morning, I gathered butter, sugar, flour, eggs, and a big bag of chocolate chips.
all.zh: 星期六早上，我準備好奶油、糖、麵粉、雞蛋與一大袋巧克力豆。

all.en: My little brother offered to help, but he kept eating the raw cookie dough.
all.zh: 我弟弟說要幫忙，卻一直偷吃生餅乾麵團。

all.en: I had to bake six trays in total, and our small oven took nearly four hours.
all.zh: 我總共要烤六盤，而我們家的小烤箱花了將近四小時。

all.en: The kitchen filled with the warm, sweet smell of butter and melted chocolate.
all.zh: 廚房裡瀰漫著奶油與融化巧克力溫暖香甜的氣味。

all.en: Unfortunately, I burned one whole tray because I forgot to set the timer.
all.zh: 可惜的是，我有一整盤烤焦了，因為忘了設定計時器。

all.en: My mother helped me pack the cookies in colorful bags tied with yellow ribbons.
all.zh: 媽媽幫我把餅乾裝進五彩繽紛的袋子裡，再繫上黃色緞帶。

all.en: At the bake sale, our cookies sold out within only two hours.
all.zh: 在義賣會上，我們的餅乾在短短兩小時內就賣完了。

all.en: We raised over three thousand dollars, which was enough to buy food and blankets.
all.zh: 我們籌得超過三千元，足以購買食物與毯子。

all.en: Knowing that the money would help homeless animals made all the hard work worth it.
all.zh: 知道這筆錢能幫助流浪動物，所有的辛苦都變得值得了。

all.en: The following Monday, the animal shelter manager visited our school to thank our entire club.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，動物收容所的負責人來到我們學校，向整個社團致謝。

all.en: She brought along two adorable puppies who had recently been rescued from a busy roadside.
all.zh: 她還帶了兩隻可愛的小狗，那是最近從繁忙的路邊救出來的。

all.en: Several students immediately asked their parents about adopting one of these gentle animals.
all.zh: 好幾位同學立刻詢問父母，能否收養其中一隻溫馴的小狗。

all.en: Inspired by our success, our club decided to organize another bake sale before winter break.
all.zh: 受到這次成功的鼓舞，社團決定在寒假前再辦一次烘焙義賣。

all.en: This time, I planned to bake gingerbread cookies shaped like dogs, cats, and rabbits.
all.zh: 這一次，我打算烤造型像狗、貓與兔子的薑餅餅乾。

all.en: My little brother promised not to eat the dough this time, though I had my doubts.
all.zh: 我弟弟答應這次不會偷吃麵團，雖然我仍有些懷疑。

all.en: A local newspaper interviewed our club president and wrote a kind story about our efforts.
all.zh: 一家當地報社採訪了我們的社長，並寫了一篇關於我們努力的溫馨報導。

all.en: More volunteers signed up for our club after reading the article in the weekend edition.
all.zh: 在週末版讀到那篇報導後，更多志工報名加入了我們的社團。

all.en: By the end of the year, our combined sales had raised nearly ten thousand dollars in total.
all.zh: 到年底時，我們累積的義賣收入合計已將近一萬元。

all.en: Helping animals through simple cookies taught me that small actions can create real change.
all.zh: 透過簡單的餅乾來幫助動物，讓我明白小小的行動也能帶來真正的改變。

all.en: For the winter sale, I baked nearly two hundred gingerbread cookies in three different shapes.
all.zh: 為了寒冬義賣，我烤了將近兩百片造型各異的薑餅。

all.en: My little brother kept his promise this time and only ate one tiny test cookie.
all.zh: 這次我弟弟遵守承諾，只吃了一片小小的試吃餅乾。

all.en: We decorated each cookie with white icing eyes, pink noses, and bright red ribbons.
all.zh: 我們在每片餅乾上裝飾白色糖霜眼睛、粉紅鼻子與鮮紅緞帶。

all.en: The newspaper article had inspired three nearby schools to organize their own charity bake sales.
all.zh: 那篇報導激勵了附近三所學校也舉辦自己的慈善烘焙義賣。

all.en: Together, our combined efforts raised enough to renovate the entire shelter's outdoor play area.
all.zh: 我們齊心協力募得的金額，足以整修收容所整個戶外活動區。

all.en: The shelter held a small ceremony where each volunteer received a handmade thank-you card.
all.zh: 收容所舉辦了一場小型典禮，每位志工都收到一張手工感謝卡。

all.en: Several rescued dogs and cats walked happily across the new grassy play space that afternoon.
all.zh: 那天下午，幾隻獲救的貓狗開心地在新的草地遊戲區走動。

all.en: My little brother officially joined the volunteer club after watching the ceremony with me.
all.zh: 我弟弟在和我一起觀看典禮後，正式加入了志工社。

all.en: He promised to bake muffins for next year's sale instead of just eating the dough.
all.zh: 他答應明年的義賣要烤瑪芬蛋糕，而不是只吃麵團。

all.en: Looking back, those simple cookies had created warmth, kindness, and connections that truly mattered.
all.zh: 回首這一切，那些簡單的餅乾創造了真正重要的溫暖、善意與連結。

all.en: The following year, my brother became the official treasurer of our school volunteer club.
all.zh: 隔年，我弟弟成為我們學校志工社的正式財務長。

all.en: He kept careful records of every dollar raised and every cookie sold at our bake sales.
all.zh: 他仔細記錄每一分募款金額與每一片義賣餅乾的銷售。

all.en: Our spring sale raised funds specifically for new rescue equipment at the local animal shelter.
all.zh: 我們春季義賣特地為當地動物收容所的新救援設備募款。

all.en: The shelter purchased two warm incubators for newborn kittens found abandoned during cold weather.
all.zh: 收容所購置了兩台保溫箱，照顧寒冷天氣中被遺棄的新生小貓。

all.en: My brother adopted one of those tiny kittens and named her Cookie in honor of our project.
all.zh: 我弟弟收養了其中一隻小小貓，並將她命名為「餅乾」以紀念我們的計畫。

all.en: Cookie now visits our school each month as our official volunteer club mascot and cheerleader.
all.zh: 餅乾現在每個月都會造訪學校，成為志工社官方吉祥物與啦啦隊員。

all.en: Our club has trained over fifty new student volunteers since our very first bake sale.
all.zh: 自從第一次烘焙義賣以來，社團已培訓超過五十位新學生志工。

all.en: Other schools regularly contact us asking for advice on launching their own charity programs.
all.zh: 其他學校經常聯繫我們，請教如何啟動他們自己的慈善活動。

all.en: My mother now volunteers at the shelter every weekend, walking dogs along the riverside trails.
all.zh: 我母親現在每個週末都到收容所當志工，沿著河邊步道遛狗。

all.en: Those simple chocolate chip cookies had truly grown into a community-wide circle of compassion.
all.zh: 那些簡單的巧克力豆餅乾，真正成長為遍及整個社區的關懷之圈。

all.en: My brother eventually transferred Cookie's leadership role to a younger volunteer at his graduation ceremony.
all.zh: 在畢業典禮上，弟弟最終將「餅乾」的領隊角色交棒給一位較年輕的志工。

all.en: He left for university but continued returning every weekend to help with our growing charity program.
all.zh: 他離家上大學，但每個週末仍持續回來協助我們日漸壯大的慈善計畫。

all.en: Our school's charity bake sale tradition continued every season under his thoughtful written guidelines.
all.zh: 在他用心撰寫的指南下，學校的慈善烘焙義賣傳統每季持續舉行。

all.en: The animal shelter expanded their facilities, adding a small medical clinic for sick rescue animals.
all.zh: 動物收容所擴建了設施，為生病的救援動物增設一間小型醫療診所。

all.en: My mother became the shelter's official weekend coordinator, organizing dog walks and adoption events.
all.zh: 我媽媽成為收容所的正式週末協調員，安排遛狗活動與認養活動。

all.en: Cookie eventually grew old and gentle, sleeping peacefully in her own basket near the shelter office.
all.zh: 餅乾後來年紀大了、變得溫順，在收容所辦公室旁有她自己的小窩，安詳地睡著。

all.en: A local university student filmed a touching documentary about our school's long charity baking journey.
all.zh: 一位當地大學生拍攝了一部感人的紀錄片，記錄我們學校長年的慈善烘焙旅程。

all.en: The film was shown at a national student film festival and won an award for community impact.
all.zh: 這部影片在全國學生影展中放映，並榮獲社區影響力獎。

all.en: My brother gave a quiet acceptance speech, sharing the memory of accidentally eating raw cookie dough.
all.zh: 我弟弟發表了一段安靜的得獎感言，分享當年不小心偷吃生餅乾麵團的回憶。

all.en: Those tiny chocolate chip cookies had truly grown into a lifelong story of compassion and kindness.
all.zh: 那些小小的巧克力豆餅乾，真正成長為一段一生的關懷與善意故事。

all.en: After the film festival, our charity baking project received donations from many gentle nationwide supporters.
all.zh: 影展結束後，我們的慈善烘焙計畫收到全國眾多溫柔支持者的捐款。

all.en: We expanded our kitchen and trained ten new young volunteers to bake every weekend together.
all.zh: 我們擴建廚房，並培訓十位年輕新志工每個週末一起烘焙。

all.en: My brother eventually opened a small bakery whose profits supported children's reading programs nationwide.
all.zh: 我弟弟最終開了一間小烘焙坊，其利潤用於支持全國的兒童閱讀計畫。

all.en: Local libraries displayed bakery cookies during weekend storytelling events for very young readers.
all.zh: 當地圖書館在週末為幼齡讀者舉辦的說故事活動中展售烘焙坊的餅乾。

all.en: A children's author wrote a picture book based loosely on our gentle Saturday morning baking ritual.
all.zh: 一位兒童作家以我們溫柔的週六早晨烘焙儀式為靈感，創作了一本繪本。

all.en: The book sold thousands of copies, and royalties returned directly into our community baking foundation.
all.zh: 這本書銷售數千本，版稅直接回流到我們的社區烘焙基金。

all.en: Volunteer bakers eventually came from neighboring cities each weekend to learn our gentle methods.
all.zh: 志工烘焙師最後每個週末從鄰近城市前來，學習我們溫柔的方法。

all.en: My brother trained his own young apprentices, teaching them never to be discouraged by burnt batches.
all.zh: 我弟弟訓練他自己的年輕學徒，教他們永遠不要被烤焦的一批餅乾所打擊。

all.en: He always reminded them that the most important ingredient is patient kindness toward every guest.
all.zh: 他總提醒他們，最重要的成分是對每位客人的耐心善意。

all.en: One tray of crooked cookies had truly become a nationwide ribbon of compassion stretching across years.
all.zh: 一盤歪歪的餅乾，真正成為一條跨越多年、橫貫全國的關懷之絲帶。

all.en: Years later, the picture book was translated into seven languages and reached classrooms abroad.
all.zh: 多年後，那本繪本被翻譯成七種語言，傳到國外的教室裡。

all.en: Children in distant countries began writing letters describing their own first attempts at home baking.
all.zh: 遠方國家的孩子開始寫信，描述他們在家中第一次嘗試烘焙的經驗。

all.en: My brother replied to every letter personally, often including a small printed cookie recipe card.
all.zh: 我弟弟親自回覆每一封信，並經常附上一張印製的小餅乾食譜卡。

all.en: A teacher in Ireland organized a sister bake sale with her students using our shared cookie recipe.
all.zh: 愛爾蘭的一位老師與她的學生用我們共享的餅乾食譜舉辦了一場姊妹義賣會。

all.en: She sent us a thoughtful video of her classroom hanging yellow ribbons just like our original bags.
all.zh: 她寄來一段用心的影片，畫面中她的教室掛著黃緞帶，就像我們最初的袋子一樣。

all.en: Inspired by her video, our foundation created an international pen pal exchange between young baking volunteers.
all.zh: 受她影片啟發，我們的基金會在年輕烘焙志工之間建立了國際筆友交流計畫。

all.en: Hundreds of students exchanged letters, photos, and family recipes across many distant friendly time zones.
all.zh: 數百位學生在許多遙遠友善的時區之間交換信件、照片與家族食譜。

all.en: Cookie's quiet basket at the shelter became a small memorial corner after she peacefully passed away.
all.zh: 餅乾安詳離世後，她在收容所那只安靜的小窩成為一個小型紀念角落。

all.en: Visitors often paused there to read her story and leave a single yellow ribbon in gratitude.
all.zh: 訪客常在那裡停下，閱讀她的故事，並留下一條黃緞帶以表達感謝。

all.en: The simple lesson of one hundred cookies had quietly become a gentle thread linking generations together.
all.zh: 一百片餅乾的簡單啟示，悄悄成為一條連結世代的溫柔絲線。

all.en: A grandmother in Japan wrote to say our recipe reminded her of cookies her own mother once baked.
all.zh: 一位日本祖母寫信來說，我們的食譜讓她想起母親從前烤過的餅乾。

all.en: She mailed a small parcel containing pressed flowers and a handwritten recipe from her family farmhouse.
all.zh: 她寄來一個小包裹，裡面有押花與她家族農舍流傳下來的手寫食譜。

all.en: My brother framed her recipe and hung it proudly above the bakery's main wooden counter.
all.zh: 我弟弟把她的食譜裱框，驕傲地掛在烘焙坊主木檯面上方。

all.en: He began offering monthly tasting events featuring one heritage recipe contributed by a distant pen pal.
all.zh: 他開始每月舉辦品嚐活動，介紹一份由遠方筆友提供的家族傳承食譜。

all.en: Each event sold out quickly, and proceeds funded book corners in rural village libraries abroad.
all.zh: 每場活動都迅速售罄，所得用於資助國外鄉村圖書館的閱讀角。

all.en: Children from those villages began sending thank-you drawings of cookies, cats, and bright yellow ribbons.
all.zh: 那些村莊的孩子開始寄來感謝畫作，畫的是餅乾、貓咪與鮮明的黃色緞帶。

all.en: We collected the drawings into a community gallery displayed inside the shelter's renovated front lobby.
all.zh: 我們把這些畫作彙整成社區藝廊，展示在收容所翻新後的前廳裡。

all.en: Local kindergarten classes took field trips to the gallery and listened to volunteers reading aloud.
all.zh: 當地幼兒園班級到藝廊校外教學，聽志工們大聲朗讀故事。

all.en: Each visiting child went home with a single warm cookie and a yellow ribbon tied around it.
all.zh: 每位來訪的孩子帶著一片溫熱的餅乾回家，餅乾上繫著一條黃緞帶。

all.en: My mother often whispered that simple kindness, baked carefully, would always find its way back home.
all.zh: 媽媽常輕聲說，細心烘焙出的單純善意，終究會找到回家的路。

all.en: On the bakery's tenth anniversary, my brother surprised us with a special limited-edition cookie tin design.
all.zh: 在烘焙坊十週年時，我弟弟以一款特別的限量版餅乾鐵盒設計給我們驚喜。

all.en: The tin featured tiny illustrations of every grandmother who had ever donated a recipe from around the world.
all.zh: 鐵盒上繪有曾捐贈食譜的各國奶奶們的迷你插畫。

all.en: Customers wrote in saying they had displayed the empty tins on their kitchen shelves long after the cookies vanished.
all.zh: 顧客寫信來說，餅乾吃完很久之後，他們仍把空鐵盒擺在廚房的層架上。

all.en: Local schools requested empty tins for small classroom art projects about kindness, baking, and global friendship.
all.zh: 當地學校索取空鐵盒，用於關於善意、烘焙與全球友誼的小型教室藝術專案。

all.en: We donated hundreds of clean tins and invited teachers to a special cookie-decorating workshop at the bakery.
all.zh: 我們捐贈了數百個清洗乾淨的鐵盒，並邀請老師們到烘焙坊參加特別的餅乾裝飾工作坊。

all.en: Each teacher left with a small recipe booklet and one warm cookie wrapped in a yellow ribbon for their car ride home.
all.zh: 每位老師離開時都帶著一本小食譜手冊，以及一片繫著黃緞帶的溫熱餅乾，供回家車上享用。

all.en: One first-grade teacher organized a class bake sale and raised enough money to repair the school library roof.
all.zh: 一位小學一年級老師舉辦了班級義賣，募得足夠資金修繕學校圖書館的屋頂。

all.en: Her students mailed us a video showing every child holding a tiny tray of homemade cookies under the new roof.
all.zh: 她的學生寄來一段影片，畫面中每個孩子在新屋頂下捧著一盤自己做的小餅乾。

all.en: My mother watched the video three times, wiping her eyes gently with the corner of her flour-dusted apron.
all.zh: 媽媽看了那段影片三次，用沾滿麵粉的圍裙一角輕輕擦拭眼角。

all.en: We baked a fresh batch of cookies that very evening, knowing kindness still rose softly like warm yeast through dough.
all.zh: 我們當晚就烤了一批新鮮餅乾，因為我們知道，善意仍像溫熱的酵母在麵團中靜靜膨脹。
